description_long: This is a compact, rectangular filing cabinet with a clean, modern design. The cabinet features a white outer frame and a light green front panel, which is equipped with three evenly spaced horizontal handles, each corresponding to a drawer. The handles are simple, rectangular, and protrude slightly for easy gripping. The sides and back of the cabinet are plain and unadorned, finished in a uniform white color. The top surface is flat and can be used to support additional objects or office supplies. The overall appearance suggests a sturdy, functional piece of furniture suitable for organizing documents in a professional or urban environment.
description: A modern, white and green filing cabinet with three drawers and simple horizontal handles. The design is clean and functional, with a flat top and plain sides.
description_view_0: A plain white side of the cabinet with no visible features or handles.
description_view_1: Another plain white side, identical to view 0, showing no handles or drawers.
description_view_2: The front of the cabinet, displaying three green drawers with white horizontal handles.
description_view_3: The back of the cabinet, plain and white with no visible features.
